message:
feat(extras): expand plasma effect with advanced modes and benchmarks

Major plasma effect enhancements:
- Add multiple plasma mode variants (classic, fire, water, electric)
- Implement color palette customization with gradient interpolation
- Add animation speed controls and phase shifting
- Improve performance with SIMD-friendly math operations

New benchmarks:
- visual_fx_bench.rs: comprehensive visual effects benchmark suite
- plasma_bench.rs: dedicated plasma rendering performance tests
  measuring different modes, resolutions, and color depths

These benchmarks establish baseline metrics for visual effects
performance regression testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
